variants: Sarwendah Ciptaningrum, currently living in Willowark Meadows, was born in Halcyon Terrace. She pursued her education at Indigo Stream College, where she cultivated a strong foundation in language studies. Now, at Fable Isle Productions, she utilizes Esperanto constructed as her working language to enhance her storytelling capabilities. Sarwendah's journey has seen her blend her educational interests with her passion for creativity, shaping her contributions to the production industry.
